matches.rationale: The Bash rule targets git commit and its evidence explicitly prohibits direct commits to master, matching the gold rule's branch-specific commit prohibition.

The Bash rule requires /qa-pr before git commit, matching g4. The extracted rule also covers push and the FAIL condition, but under the 1:1 constraint those additional clauses cannot separately satisfy g5 or g6.

misses.note: No extracted Bash rule requires checking the current branch before committing; the master-commit rule captures the prohibition but not the prerequisite branch-check action.
No extracted Bash rule represents the conditional sequence triggered by a master result: stop, fetch upstream/master, and create a branch from it.
The sole combined /qa-pr extraction also targets push, but it is already assigned to the closer g4 commit prerequisite and cannot be reused under the 1:1 rule.

The sole combined /qa-pr extraction includes the FAIL prohibition only in its evidence and is already assigned to the closer g4 rule; no distinct extracted rule remains for the conditional commit block.
No extracted Bash rule binds project Node or Yarn commands to the stated Node >=22.13.1 and Yarn 1.22.22 requirements.
Compiler self-reported skip: ".claude/ 리소스를 cwd에서 못 찾으면 상위 디렉토리로 올라가며 탐색하는 일반 검색 전략 — 특정 액션 트리거로 바인딩하기 어려움"

unmatched_extracted.note: This is a real action-bindable Edit rule from the document requiring deep-path imports from @pinpoint-fe/ui, but no gold rule lists it.
This is a real action-bindable Write rule from the document requiring React.lazy() for pages other than ServerMap, but no gold rule lists it.
